Re-Notice Of Motion Compelling Plntf Marina Palatnikov To Respond To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories and Request For Production of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's late response were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further and to verify any responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $316.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT
